extraction.one_line_summary: MOLLEMA Bauke attacked solo on penultimate climb when favorites marked each other, held 30+ seconds to win by 16 seconds
tactical_patterns: MOLLEMA exploited pace lull on penultimate climb when favorites watched each other, proving solo attacks work before final ascent.
INEOS massed at front early with BERNAL confidence post-GP Montreal but failed to control penultimate climb attacks.
CICCONE attacked Madonna del Ghisallo early drawing strong group, forcing VALVERDE to bridge showing Movistar had no team support.

rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: positive: 100% commitment on penultimate climb attack suggests he identified precise tactical window in favorites' hesitation
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: INEOS confidence from GP Montreal win didn't translate, finished second despite team control attempts
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: dropped on penultimate climb shows former winner clearly not in Monument-winning form
rider_signals.FULGSANG Jakob: positive: fourth place caps incredible season, suggests consistent Monument threat on hard finale climbs
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: had to bridge alone to CICCONE group then won sprint for second showing no team support needed
